evidence_summary: The group reunites within the palace guest quarters to process individual trials and consolidate their resolve. The scene must transition from a state of weary uncertainty to a unified, somber commitment to face the Witch and depart for the land of the Wink...

The group reunites and discusses their individual encounters. Realizing they have no other way to get what they want, they agree to face the Witch and prepare for their journey to the land of the Winkies the next morning.
Characters enter or sit in a state of exhaustion and doubt.
The group is gathered, prepared, and ready for morning departure.
Discussing individual encounters leads to the collective decision to face the Witch.
